languages.text: Создать монументы посвященные павшим героям полка, напоминающим о свободе для одного и тех, кто отдал свои жизни за то, чтобы меровцы смогли жить.

traits.locale_text: Создать монументы посвященные павшим героям полка, напоминающим о свободе для одного и тех, кто отдал свои жизни за то, чтобы меровцы смогли жить.

languages.text: За столетия выживания на Заркове история 32-го полка пополнилась именами доблестных воинов, каждый из которых достоин изваяния. Взирая на них, подданные Вольного Торговца воспрянут духом и с большей готовностью примут неизбежное "искупление для одного".

traits.locale_text: Монументы в честь героев полка укрепят боевой дух жителей планеты.

languages.text: Over centuries of survival on Zarkov, the history of the 32nd Regiment has been enriched by the names of valiant warriors, each worthy of a monument. Inspired by them, the Rogue Trader's subjects shall find new courage and more willingly embrace the inevitable "atonement for the one."
languages.original_text: За столетия выживания на Заркове история 32-го полка пополнилась именами доблестных воинов, каждый из которых достоин изваяния. Взирая на них, подданные Вольного Торговца воспрянут духом и с большей готовностью примут неизбежное "искупление для одного".

traits.locale_text: Over centuries of survival on Zarkov, the history of the 32nd Regiment has been enriched by the names of valiant warriors, each worthy of a monument. Inspired by them, the Rogue Trader's subjects shall find new courage and more willingly embrace the inevitable "atonement for the one."

Over centuries of survival on Zarkov, the history of the 32nd Regiment has been enriched by the names of valiant warriors, each worthy of a monument. Inspired by them, the Rogue Trader's subjects shall find new courage and more willingly embrace the inevitable "atonement for the one."

Over centuries of survival on Zarkov, the history of the 32nd Regiment has been enriched by the names of valiant warriors, each worthy of a monument. Inspired by them, the Rogue Trader's subjects shall find new courage and more willingly embrace the inevitable "atonement for the one."

Over centuries of survival on Zarkov, the history of the 32nd Regiment has been enriched by the names of valiant warriors, each worthy of a monument. Inspired by them, the Rogue Trader's subjects shall find new courage and more willingly embrace the inevitable "atonement for the one."

languages.text: Siglos de supervivencia en Zarkov han hecho que el historial del 32.º regimiento esté lleno de nombres de valerosos guerreros que merecerían un monumento cada uno. Inspirándose en ellos, los súbditos de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente renovarán su valor y aceptarán de mejor grado la inevitable «expiación para el último».
languages.original_text: Over centuries of survival on Zarkov, the history of the 32nd Regiment has been enriched by the names of valiant warriors, each worthy of a monument. Inspired by them, the Rogue Trader's subjects shall find new courage and more willingly embrace the inevitable "atonement for the one."

traits.locale_text: Siglos de supervivencia en Zarkov han hecho que el historial del 32.º regimiento esté lleno de nombres de valerosos guerreros que merecerían un monumento cada uno. Inspirándose en ellos, los súbditos de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente renovarán su valor y aceptarán de mejor grado la inevitable «expiación para el último».

languages.text: 数百年来在扎尔科夫上求生的岁月中，第32团的历史已被无数英勇战士的名字填满，他们每个人都值得拥有纪念碑。在他们的激励下，行商浪人的臣民将焕发新的勇气，也更甘愿接受那不可避免的“一人之赎”。
languages.original_text: Over centuries of survival on Zarkov, the history of the 32nd Regiment has been enriched by the names of valiant warriors, each worthy of a monument. Inspired by them, the Rogue Trader's subjects shall find new courage and more willingly embrace the inevitable "atonement for the one."

traits.locale_text: 数百年来在扎尔科夫上求生的岁月中，第32团的历史已被无数英勇战士的名字填满，他们每个人都值得拥有纪念碑。在他们的激励下，行商浪人的臣民将焕发新的勇气，也更甘愿接受那不可避免的“一人之赎”。

languages.text: Ayant passé des siècles à tout faire pour survivre sur Zarkov, le 32e régiment a compté tout au long de son histoire de nombreux guerriers valeureux qui méritent tous un monument. Inspirés par leur exemple, les sujets {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} puiseront en eux un courage renouvelé et seront plus enclins à se conformer à la doctrine de « l'expiation pour un seul ».
languages.original_text: Over centuries of survival on Zarkov, the history of the 32nd Regiment has been enriched by the names of valiant warriors, each worthy of a monument. Inspired by them, the Rogue Trader's subjects shall find new courage and more willingly embrace the inevitable "atonement for the one."

traits.locale_text: Ayant passé des siècles à tout faire pour survivre sur Zarkov, le 32e régiment a compté tout au long de son histoire de nombreux guerriers valeureux qui méritent tous un monument. Inspirés par leur exemple, les sujets {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} puiseront en eux un courage renouvelé et seront plus enclins à se conformer à la doctrine de « l'expiation pour un seul ».

languages.text: Zarkov'da hayatta kalmakla geçirdikleri yüzyıllar içinde 32. Alay'ın tarihi, her biri bir anıtı hak eden cesur savaşçıların isimleriyle zenginleşti. Onlardan ilham alan Hür Tacir'in tebaası, yeniden cesaret bulacak ve kaçınılmaz olan "sona kalana kefaret" hakkını daha istekli bir şekilde kucaklayacak.
languages.original_text: Over centuries of survival on Zarkov, the history of the 32nd Regiment has been enriched by the names of valiant warriors, each worthy of a monument. Inspired by them, the Rogue Trader's subjects shall find new courage and more willingly embrace the inevitable "atonement for the one."

traits.locale_text: Zarkov'da hayatta kalmakla geçirdikleri yüzyıllar içinde 32. Alay'ın tarihi, her biri bir anıtı hak eden cesur savaşçıların isimleriyle zenginleşti. Onlardan ilham alan Hür Tacir'in tebaası, yeniden cesaret bulacak ve kaçınılmaz olan "sona kalana kefaret" hakkını daha istekli bir şekilde kucaklayacak.

languages.text: ザルコフで生き延びてきた32連隊の歴史は、記念碑に値する勇敢な戦士たちの名で彩られている。彼らに勇気づけられたように、ローグトレーダーの部下たちは新たな勇気を持ち、避けられない「一人への贖罪」を喜んで受け入れるであろう。
languages.original_text: Over centuries of survival on Zarkov, the history of the 32nd Regiment has been enriched by the names of valiant warriors, each worthy of a monument. Inspired by them, the Rogue Trader's subjects shall find new courage and more willingly embrace the inevitable "atonement for the one."

traits.locale_text: ザルコフで生き延びてきた32連隊の歴史は、記念碑に値する勇敢な戦士たちの名で彩られている。彼らに勇気づけられたように、ローグトレーダーの部下たちは新たな勇気を持ち、避けられない「一人への贖罪」を喜んで受け入れるであろう。

languages.text: In den Jahrhunderten des Überlebens auf Zarkov dienten im 32. Regiment tapfere Krieger, die allesamt eines Denkmals würdig waren. Inspiriert von diesen Kriegern werden die Untertanen {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} neuen Mut finden und die unabänderliche 'Sühne für den Einzelnen' bereitwilliger annehmen.
languages.original_text: Over centuries of survival on Zarkov, the history of the 32nd Regiment has been enriched by the names of valiant warriors, each worthy of a monument. Inspired by them, the Rogue Trader's subjects shall find new courage and more willingly embrace the inevitable "atonement for the one."

traits.locale_text: In den Jahrhunderten des Überlebens auf Zarkov dienten im 32. Regiment tapfere Krieger, die allesamt eines Denkmals würdig waren. Inspiriert von diesen Kriegern werden die Untertanen {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} neuen Mut finden und die unabänderliche 'Sühne für den Einzelnen' bereitwilliger annehmen.
